steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content:
Subtract $18$, then divide by $15$.
$$15a=3\;\Rightarrow\;a=\tfrac{1}{5}$$
The answer is 1/5.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $.2,0.2,1/5$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $.2,0.2,1/5$.
